title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours
why_this_song: Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours by Stevie Wonder (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Then that time I went and said goodbye
Now I'm back and not ashamed to cry
I've done a lot of foolish things

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yours" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yours" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You got the future in your hands

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now I'm wondering if your love's still strong
When I touch them, they mean nothing, girl

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
